executable.title: SAM 3.1 Text Segmentation
executable.description: Segment all instances matching a text prompt on a DIVE video frame using SAM 3.1, optionally propagate masks forward through subsequent frames, and ingest annotations
executable.acknowledgements: This work is part of the DIVE project.

string.name: TextPrompt
string.label: Text prompt
string.description: Open-vocabulary phrase describing what to segment (e.g. "person", "red car")

double.name: ConfidenceThreshold
double.label: Confidence threshold
double.description: Minimum detection score (0-1) to keep an instance

string.name: DIVETrackType
string.label: Track type
string.description: Classification label applied to each new track

integer.name: DIVEFrameId
integer.description: Frame index to run text segmentation on
integer.label: Frame Id

integer.name: TrackingFrames
integer.description: Number of frames to track forward from the prompt frame (1 = single frame only)
integer.label: Tracking Frames

directory.name: DIVEDirectory
directory.description: An input DIVE Directory. If no default is specified, the current directory is used,
directory.label: Input DIVE directory

parameters.label: Girder API URL and Key
parameters.description: A Girder API URL and token for Girder client
